name: Roasted Pheasant
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the pheasant with salt and pepper, both inside and out.
2. Place a bay leaf, garlic, celery leaves, and lemon in the cavity of the bird.
3. Truss the legs and wings with cotton string.
4. Place the breast-side up into a roasting pan.
5. Drape bacon slices over the breast.
6. Moisten a piece of cheesecloth with melted butter and place it over the bacon slices.
7. Arrange onions and mushrooms around the bird.
8. Moisten the pheasant with chicken broth.
9. Roast at 350°F for 80-90 minutes, basting often, until tender.
10. Remove the cheesecloth and cotton string before serving.
